# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest minor release receives security fixes.

| Package                     | Version | Supported |
| --------------------------- | ------- | --------- |
| `sanity-plugin-blank-space` | latest  | Yes       |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please use [GitHub's private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/jordanl17/sanity-plugin-blank-space/security/advisories/new) to report a security issue. Avoid opening a public issue, as this may expose the vulnerability before a fix is available.

You can expect an initial response within a few days. If the vulnerability is accepted, a fix will be released as a patch to the latest supported version and you will be credited in the release notes. If it is declined, you will receive an explanation.
